_comment: pi-tmux-title config. Precedence (later overrides earlier): global ~/.pi/agent/pi-tmux-title.json < extension ./config.json (this dir) < project <cwd>/.pi/pi-tmux-title.json (trusted). Partial configs merge over the built-in defaults. Zero config = defaults below. Replaces the tokyo-night theme terminal icon on pi's tmux window with a state-driven one, via a WINDOW-LEVEL window-status-format patch (other windows keep the global theme format). @pi_t = '<icon> ' (icon + trailing space). States: idle=prefix, generating=busy, done=done-badge (only if pi's tmux window was inactive when the turn finished; reverts to prefix when you switch back to that window). Focus tracking is tmux-internal (#{window_active}) — no DEC 1004 / focus-events needed. pollMs = window-active poll interval while in the done state. No-op outside tmux / TUI mode. activeGlyph/inactiveGlyph are the theme's baked-in terminal-icon glyphs to replace (defaults match tokyo-night: \ue795 active, \uf489 inactive). Config is read at session start; restart pi to apply edits.
